meaning: n.登录,条目,进入,入口,[商]报关手续,[律]对土地的侵占,对房屋的侵入
examples: He made a triumphal entry into the city.
He made his triumphal entry into Mexico City.
Entry to the museum is free.
In some cases, these dark pools allow outsiders entry to increase their order flow.
Colonising a clutch of old workshops, 15 free-entry galleries and exhibition spaces now call the area home.
